message:
style(tests): format pool_leak and wheel_hit_tick_test whitespace

Fix trailing whitespace in pool_leak.rs assert line, reformat
NoopWaker Wake impl to multi-line, and sort import order in
wheel_hit_tick_test.rs to satisfy rustfmt.
